name: nausea
description: patient reports nausea

name: vomiting
description: patient reports vomiting

name: diarrhea
description: patient reports diarrhea

name: constipation
description: patient reports constipation

name: loss of appetite
description: patient reports loss of appetite or anorexia

name: fever > 38C
description: temperature above 38°C

name: chills
description: patient reports chills

name: BRBPR
description: bright red blood per rectum

name: RLQ pain
description: patient reports right lower quadrant pain

name: LLQ pain
description: patient reports left lower quadrant pain

name: RUQ pain
description: patient reports right upper quadrant pain

name: epigastric pain
description: patient reports epigastric pain

name: diffuse abdominal pain
description: patient reports diffuse or generalized abdominal pain

name: suprapubic pain
description: patient reports suprapubic pain

name: periumbilical pain
description: patient reports periumbilical pain

name: pain migrates to RLQ
description: pain started periumbilical or diffuse then migrated to RLQ

name: pain radiates to back
description: patient reports pain radiating to the back

name: sharp pain
description: patient describes pain as sharp or stabbing

name: crampy pain
description: patient describes pain as crampy or colicky

name: constant pain
description: patient reports pain is constant rather than intermittent

name: pain worse with eating
description: pain worsened by eating or postprandial

name: pain worse with movement
description: pain worsened by movement or coughing

name: worst pain ever
description: patient describes this as the worst pain of their life

name: RLQ tenderness
description: right lower quadrant tenderness on exam

name: LLQ tenderness
description: left lower quadrant tenderness on exam

name: RUQ tenderness
description: right upper quadrant tenderness on exam

name: epigastric tenderness
description: epigastric tenderness on exam

name: rebound tenderness
description: rebound tenderness on abdominal exam

name: guarding
description: voluntary or involuntary abdominal guarding on exam

name: peritoneal signs
description: peritoneal signs noted on exam

name: abdominal distension
description: abdomen distended on exam

name: Murphy sign positive
description: positive Murphy sign on exam

name: Rovsing sign positive
description: positive Rovsing sign on exam

name: psoas sign positive
description: positive psoas sign on exam

name: obturator sign positive
description: positive obturator sign on exam

name: McBurney point tenderness
description: tenderness localized to McBurney point

name: hypoactive bowel sounds
description: bowel sounds hypoactive or absent on auscultation

name: jaundice
description: jaundice or scleral icterus on exam

name: hypotension
description: systolic BP < 90 or described as hypotensive

name: WBC > 12k
description: white blood cell count above 12,000/uL

name: left shift
description: elevated neutrophils or bandemia

name: CRP elevated
description: C-reactive protein above normal

name: lactate elevated
description: serum lactate above normal

name: lipase elevated
description: serum lipase above upper limit of normal

name: amylase elevated
description: serum amylase above upper limit of normal

name: ALT elevated
description: alanine aminotransferase above normal

name: AST elevated
description: aspartate aminotransferase above normal

name: AlkPhos elevated
description: alkaline phosphatase above normal

name: total bilirubin elevated
description: total bilirubin above normal

name: triglycerides elevated
description: serum triglycerides above normal

name: low hemoglobin
description: hemoglobin below lower limit of normal

name: elevated INR
description: INR above normal

name: appendix dilated on CT
description: appendix >6mm diameter on CT

name: appendicolith on CT
description: appendicolith or fecalith on CT

name: periappendiceal fat stranding
description: fat stranding around appendix on CT

name: appendix perforation on imaging
description: appendiceal perforation or rupture on CT

name: appendiceal abscess on imaging
description: abscess adjacent to appendix on imaging

name: appendix not visualized
description: appendix not visualized on CT or ultrasound

name: gallstones on imaging
description: gallstones on ultrasound or CT

name: gallbladder wall thickening
description: gallbladder wall thickening on imaging

name: pericholecystic fluid
description: pericholecystic fluid or edema on imaging

name: sonographic Murphy sign
description: positive sonographic Murphy sign on ultrasound

name: gallbladder distended
description: gallbladder distended on imaging

name: GB sludge on imaging
description: gallbladder sludge on ultrasound or CT

name: HIDA scan positive
description: HIDA scan positive for acute cholecystitis

name: CBD dilated
description: common bile duct above normal diameter on imaging

name: choledocholithiasis on imaging
description: stone in common bile duct on imaging

name: biliary dilatation
description: intrahepatic or extrahepatic biliary dilatation on imaging

name: peripancreatic stranding
description: fat stranding around pancreas on CT

name: pancreatic inflammation on CT
description: pancreas enlarged, edematous, or inflamed on CT

name: peripancreatic fluid collection
description: fluid collection around pancreas on CT

name: pancreatic calcifications
description: calcifications in pancreas on imaging (chronic changes)

name: pancreatic duct dilated
description: pancreatic duct dilatation on imaging

name: diverticulosis on CT
description: diverticula present on CT

name: pericolonic fat stranding
description: fat stranding adjacent to colon on CT

name: sigmoid wall thickening
description: sigmoid colon wall thickening on CT

name: colonic wall thickening
description: bowel wall thickening on CT (non-sigmoid)

name: free air on CT
description: extraluminal free air or pneumoperitoneum on CT

name: abscess on CT
description: intra-abdominal abscess on CT

name: free fluid on CT
description: free fluid in abdomen/pelvis on CT

name: history of prior similar episode
description: patient reports prior similar episode

name: history of gallstones
description: known history of gallstones or cholelithiasis

name: history of cholecystectomy
description: prior cholecystectomy

name: history of pancreatitis
description: prior episode of pancreatitis

name: alcohol use before onset
description: alcohol use in days before symptom onset

name: recent ERCP
description: ERCP performed recently or during this admission

name: history of diabetes
description: known history of diabetes mellitus

name: female sex
description: patient is female

name: age >= 65
description: patient is 65 years or older based on stated age, date of birth, or descriptions like 'elderly'

name: tachycardia
description: heart rate above 100 bpm

name: creatinine elevated
description: serum creatinine above normal

name: BUN elevated
description: blood urea nitrogen above normal

name: glucose elevated
description: serum glucose above normal

name: potassium abnormal
description: serum potassium above or below normal range

name: bicarbonate low
description: serum bicarbonate below normal

name: sodium abnormal
description: serum sodium above or below normal range

name: platelet count abnormal
description: platelet count above or below normal range

name: urinalysis abnormal
description: pyuria, hematuria, or bacteriuria on urinalysis

name: dysuria
description: patient reports painful urination

name: lipase normal
description: lipase was tested and result is within normal limits (not elevated)

name: WBC normal
description: WBC was tested and result is within normal range 4-12k (not elevated, not low)

name: LFTs normal
description: liver function tests (ALT, AST, bilirubin) were tested and all are within normal limits

name: lactate normal
description: lactate was tested and result is within normal limits (not elevated)
